## Description / Excerpt

A small ULiUA story about mutual stabilization, intergenerational trust, playful leadership, and the invariant that partner diversity increases system stability.

Excerpt:

--- ## The Moment One day, I was doing yoga with my five-year-old granddaughter. She wanted help with poses, so I held her hands as we balanced together. At first, it felt like a simple act of support — adult steadying child. But something deeper emerged: She struck a perfect pos
